headline: Is USB’s Stronger Outlook And BTIG Fee Push Altering The Investment Case For U.S. Bancorp (USB)?
summary: In the past quarter, U.S. Bancorp reported year-over-year increases in net interest income to US$4,361 million and net income to US$2,177 million, while also completing a US$1,086.66 million share repurchase program and raising its 2026 total net revenue growth guidance to 7% to 9% including BTIG. Management now expects BTIG to contribute about US$200 million in quarterly fee revenue in the second half of 2026 and sees capital markets at roughly 7% of total revenue with an aim to grow...

Management now expects BTIG to contribute about US$200 million in quarterly fee revenue in the second half of 2026 and sees capital markets at roughly 7% of total revenue with an aim to grow...

headline: US Bancorp Invests In Future Growth, Analyst Raises Price Target on Strong Profitability
summary: USB posts Q2 earnings beat. Expenses growth accelerates after 10 quarters. Analyst reiterates Buy rating, raises PT to $74.

headline: U.S. Bancorp Series A Preferred: A High-Quality Floating-Rate Security At A Discount To Par
summary: USB.PR.A's floating-rate structure and coupon floor of 3.5% provide low-duration exposure and mitigate negative convexity. Read more on USB stock here.
